headline: Contributing to Web Development Documentation and core engine: My Journey with MCP, Model Context Protocol, MDN and web.dev
description: Yuri Shapkarin contributions to major web development platforms, including Model Context Protocol (MCP inspector repo by Agentic AI Foundation) ecosystem, Mozilla's MDN (+it's engine) and Google's web.dev, highlighting the impact of small contributions in the open-source community
keywords: open source contribution, gitHub, mozilla, mdn, google, web.dev, pull request, issues, javascript, web development, yari, mdn content, tab-glutton, open source, developer portfolio, community contribution
